overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, likely from Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves along a sidewalk beside a multi-lane road, passing by a large construction site and rocky hillside, with neon-lit skyscrapers visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk alongside multi-lane highway with construction site ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk toward a distant pedestrian and construction site

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: large cylindrical building under construction with exposed scaffolding and cranes
tall concrete retaining wall with rocky texture and graffiti
illuminated colorful advertisement billboard on distant building
low concrete wall separating sidewalk from lower level

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark urban sidewalk at night, walking toward a large construction site visible in the distance. A lone pedestrian walks ahead in the same direction, while vehicles occasionally pass on the multi-lane road to the right. Neon billboards glow in the distant city skyline to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban walkway with view of downtown skyline

events.description: camera pans left to view the city skyline and skyscraper with '07' signage
camera returns to forward-facing direction, continuing along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: pausing forward progress to look left at the city skyline, then resuming walking

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with illuminated '07' signage on the facade

segments.scene_description: The camera briefly turns left to reveal a stunning view of the downtown skyline, featuring a prominent skyscraper marked with '07'. After observing the cityscape, the view returns to the forward path along the sidewalk, with the pedestrian no longer visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway shoulder approaching unfinished construction zone

events.description: abandoned wrecked car becomes visible on the sidewalk ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk, approaching a derelict vehicle and the construction site

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving past on the road with headlights on

entered.detail: wrecked and abandoned vehicle sitting on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Walking steadily toward the construction site, which now looms larger on the left. An abandoned wrecked car sits on the sidewalk ahead, while traffic increases on the road to the right. The rocky hillside wall recedes into the distance as the path curves slightly.

scene_state.functional_zone: construction zone perimeter with rocky cliff face

events.description: passing the abandoned car and entering the shadow of the construction site

agents.ego_description: walking past the abandoned vehicle, staying close to the construction site barrier

notable_agents.action: large truck driving past with bright headlights illuminating the scene

entered.detail: sparse desert shrubs and plants growing along the construction perimeter

segments.scene_description: The final segment passes closely by the massive construction site, now dominating the left side of the frame. The abandoned car is left behind as the camera moves into a slightly narrower section of walkway. Vehicles continue to pass on the right, their headlights cutting through the night, while the rocky hillside rises up again on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a dark urban sidewalk that shifts from a focused forward path toward a panoramic reveal of a neon-lit metropolis. It begins by tracking a lone pedestrian walking toward a distant construction site, while vehicles stream along a multi-lane road to the right. As the camera moves forward, it briefly pivots left to open up a stunning view of the downtown skyline, highlighted by a prominent skyscraper marked with 07. The perspective then returns to the forward path along the sidewalk, now empty of the pedestrian, as the camera continues its journey toward the industrial site.

The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a city sidewalk that transitions from an open roadside view to a more enclosed passage dominated by a massive construction site. It begins with a steady walk toward the looming construction area on the left, passing an abandoned wrecked car as traffic increases on the adjacent road. As the path curves slightly and the rocky hillside recedes, the camera moves closer to the construction site until the structure dominates the left side of the frame. The scene then shifts into a narrower section of the walkway, leaving the wrecked car behind while vehicle headlights cut through the night on the right. Finally, the perspective tightens as the rocky hillside rises up again to flank the right side of the path.
